docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,359.85 FILED BY UTT, COURTNEY AS TO DEFENDANT KANAAN, RAMSEY DBA  PM PRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UTT, COURTNEY AS TO DEFENDANT KANAAN, RAMSEY DBA  PM PRESS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UTT, COURTNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANAAN, RAMSEY DBA  PM PRESS $1,359.85 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,399.85, PLAINTIFF RETAINS COPYRIGHT ON DIGITAL FILES, WHICH SHALL BE USED FOR PURPOSE OF REPRINTING ORIGINAL WORKS, AND NOT FOR MAKING NEW WORK. PLAINTIFF SHALL TURN OVER DIGITAL FILES TO DEFENDANT AFTER PAYMENT IS RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-18-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KANAAN, RAMSEY DBA  PM PRESS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY UTT, COURTNEY KANAAN, RAMSEY DBA  PM PRESS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
